description:
One advisor's completion of a single lesson (GRS-0121). Completing every approved lesson of a
COURSEWORK-credit course grants the coursework credit via the existing certification path.

owner_consultant_id.description: The consultant who owns this resource. Data scoping is by this field, enforced in the repository layer and tested from day one.
owner_consultant_id.title: Owner Consultant Id
